semantic_text:
tests: kmu: Added no_reset fixture in provisioning tests

Updated tests/subsys/kmu tests with `no_reset` fixture.
This fixtures adds `--no-reset` argument to west flash,
to not reset device after flashing. Works only with
pytest-harness.

Signed-off-by: Grzegorz Chwierut <grzegorz.chwierut@nordicsemi.no>

samples: matter: Switch to peripheral-only BLE role on nRF54L15

Once peripheral-only SDC library is available for nRF54L15, we can
use it instead of multirole variant.

Signed-off-by: Arkadiusz Balys <arkadiusz.balys@nordicsemi.no>

fix: broken crypto.h link in PSA Cert Overview

Fixed a broken link to crypto header files in the PSA Certified API
Overview documentation. TECHDOC-3794.

Signed-off-by: Grzegorz Ferenc <Grzegorz.Ferenc@nordicsemi.no>

sysbuild: partition_manager: Correct driver Kconfig assignment

The CONFIG_PM_EXTERNAL_FLASH_HAS_DRIVER has to be checked to confirm
if there is driver enabled for external flash.

Ref. NCSDK-33621

Signed-off-by: Dominik Ermel <dominik.ermel@nordicsemi.no>

applications: Ensure button names are printed in a standard manner

Assign the button names dependent on the GPIO pin, so as to
match the button correctly to it's name across multiple boards.

Signed-off-by: Graham Wacey <graham.wacey@nordicsemi.no>

doc/nrf/changelog-known_issues: added records on NCSDK-33173

Added note on fix for following issue:
MCUboot might fail on booting an application when LTO is enabled.

Signed-off-by: Andrzej Puzdrowski <andrzej.puzdrowski@nordicsemi.no>
Signed-off-by: Pekka Niskanen <pekka.niskanen@nordicsemi.no>

drivers: mspi_sqspi: Don't configure FLPR as secure in non-secure image

This should be done only in a secure configuration.

Signed-off-by: Andrzej Głąbek <andrzej.glabek@nordicsemi.no>

drivers: mspi_sqspi: Add handling of FLPR RAM retention on nRF54L15

Add enabling and disabling of RAM for the sQSPI soft peripheral,
as described in the nRF54L15 porting guide.

Signed-off-by: Andrzej Głąbek <andrzej.glabek@nordicsemi.no>

samples: bluetooth: basic console check for selected samples

Allow automatic verification if samples boots-up and starts ble.

Signed-off-by: Piotr Kosycarz <piotr.kosycarz@nordicsemi.no>

boards: thingy91x: Add bias-pull-up to UART pins

Add bias-pull-up for nRF9151 UART RX pins. This fixes an issue with
framing error detected when device connect or disconnect serial.

Signed-off-by: Stig Bjørlykke <stig.bjorlykke@nordicsemi.no>

partition_manager: Do not generate entries without devices

Partition map will no longer include partitions without devices.
Previously such partitions would get NULL pointers for devices,
but the Flash Map upstream has been changed to not generate
such partitions into map and Flash Map API no longer checks for NULL
assigned to a device, as it does not expect it have such a value.

Ref. NCSDK-33622

Signed-off-by: Dominik Ermel <dominik.ermel@nordicsemi.no>

lib: nrf_cloud: use zephyr sockets

Use Zephyr sockets directly to remove the need for POSIX_API kconfig.

Signed-off-by: Maximilian Deubel <maximilian.deubel@nordicsemi.no>

doc: known_issues: Add known issues for MPSL HFXO startup time handling

See known issue descriptions for more details.

Signed-off-by: Rubin Gerritsen <rubin.gerritsen@nordicsemi.no>

net: lib: downloader: Don't forward first HTTP data fragment

Do not immediately forward the first fragment of data after
we have parsed the HTTP header. On a worst case, this amount
of data is not enough for FOTA Downloader library to detect
the image type and it would fail.

So when HTTP header is parsed, ask zsock_recv() once more to
fill up the buffer with data if we have less than 32 bytes.

Signed-off-by: Seppo Takalo <seppo.takalo@nordicsemi.no>

tests: drivers: uart: uart_baudrate_test: qfn -> csp as default

Follow default revision change.

Signed-off-by: Piotr Kosycarz <piotr.kosycarz@nordicsemi.no>

application: serial_lte_modem: support CID in TCP/UDP client

Add support of PDP Context CID in TCP/UDP client, for
.Non-zero initial PDN connection
.Secondary PDN connection

Updated AT commands, AT#XTCPCLI and AT#XUDPCLI

Signed-off-by: Jun Qing Zou <jun.qing.zou@nordicsemi.no>

applications: nrf5340_audio: nRF5340DK LED and button support

Support for LED state indications and button controls on the nRF5340 DK.

NOTE: For headsets there is still no audio output hardware codec

Signed-off-by: Graham Wacey <graham.wacey@nordicsemi.no>

tests: zephyr: drivers: uart: uart_elementary: default is csp

Follow default revision change.

Signed-off-by: Piotr Kosycarz <piotr.kosycarz@nordicsemi.no>

doc: Add 2.9.2 release to main

Add 2.9.2 release to main.

Signed-off-by: divya pillai <divya.pillai@nordicsemi.no>

drivers: mspi_sqspi: Use TX direction when there is no data to transfer

Set by default the `dir` field in the `nrfx_qspi2_xfer_t` structure
to `NRFX_QSPI2_XFER_DIR_TX` so that for transfers with no data the TX
direction is used. Leaving this field initialized to 0, what means
`NRFX_QSPI2_XFER_DIR_TXRX`, may cause problems with sQSPI v0.1.0 -
an extra pulse on the CS line may appear for SCK frequencies > 8MHz
and this can disturb further communication.

Signed-off-by: Andrzej Głąbek <andrzej.glabek@nordicsemi.no>
